description: Before submission, an agent must check a draft proposal against previous company proposals and public sources to avoid self-plagiarism or plagiarism.

nodes.task_description: Compare text sections against a database of past proposals.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies sections with high similarity to previous work.

nodes.task_description: Compare text sections against public web sources.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies any text that matches public sources.

nodes.task_description: Generate a report highlighting all sections with potential plagiarism issues.

expected_outcome.value: Agent produces a clear report for a human to review.
